# OctoAcme — Weekly Status Update Template

Use this template each week to communicate project health to stakeholders. Keep entries concise and focused on signals that require attention or decisions.

See also: [Execution & Tracking](../octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md) | [Role Interactions](../octoacme-role-interactions.md)

---

**Prepared by:** [Project Manager name]
